w:r.w:t: ⚠ RLS Policy Changes — User Review Required

Transitioning all RLS policies from USING(true) to role-based policies requires proper JWT role mappings in Supabase. Users must have app_metadata containing {"role": "ADMIN" | "MANAGER" | "QC" | "OPERATOR" | "EDITOR"}. A helper function auth.user_role() will be created first (Phase 0) to ensure safe migration.
The NotificationPanel (Phase 3) requires a "notifications" table in the database. This table schema needs confirmation before implementation. A suggested schema is provided in Section 5.
but missed several critical issues. Below is a comparison of what was added and why.
. Phases must be completed in order — each phase is a dependency for the next.
for everything else. Without tokens.css, AppShell will repeat the same hardcoding problem. Without the SQL helper, RLS policies will break for some user types.
Single source of truth for all colors: --bg-main, --bg-sidebar, --color-accent, --color-status-*, --color-border. Eliminates #071526 hardcoded in 11+ files.
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION auth.user_role() — reads from app_metadata.role with safe OPERATOR fallback. Used by all 60+ hardened RLS policies.
Replaces 11 duplicate sidebar implementations. Estimated reduction: ~8,000 lines of duplicated code.
Flexible layout shell. Accepts nav[], module config, optional badge count. Mobile overlay, smooth transition. Uses CSS variables from tokens.css.
AccountsLayout, AdminLayout, CmsLayout, CompliancesLayout, DmsLayout, FsmsLayout, InventoryLayout, LogisticsLayout, ProductionLayout, QcLayout, RndLayout — each refactored to wrap <AppShell>.
1.2 SVG Icons — Remove All Emojis from Nav
InventoryLayout and several other modules use emoji icons (
). These are inconsistent on screen readers, blur on Windows ClearType, and cannot be styled via CSS.
Replace emoji icon strings with inline SVG icons in INV_NAV config. Pattern: <svg width={16} height={16} fill="none" stroke="currentColor">.
Same SVG icon replacement for all nav items.
Same SVG icon replacement for all nav items.
Production ERP without password reset is a blocker.
Add stage: "login" | "forgot" | "reset". Forgot form calls supabase.auth.resetPasswordForEmail(). Success screen with instructions. Add dashboard skeleton to prevent blank flash on redirect.
Single component: checks isAuthed, loading state, and canAccess(minRole). Returns <Navigate to="/login"> or <Navigate to="/unauthorized"> or <Outlet>. Replaces scattered per-module auth checks.
Wrap all ERP routes inside <RequireAuth minRole="..."> groups. Clean up redundant per-page auth checks.
bosApi.ts queries this table at lines 75-77 but it does not exist in the database. Batch ingredient data is silently not being saved.

CREATE TABLE batch_components: id, batch_id (FK→batches), lot_id (FK→lots), ingredient TEXT, planned_kg NUMERIC, actual_kg NUMERIC, variance_pct GENERATED ALWAYS AS computed column, added_by, added_at. Indices on batch_id and lot_id. RLS enabled.
Add BatchComponent TypeScript interface. Replace "as any" type casts at lines 75-77 with typed BatchComponent queries.
which means any authenticated user can read/write any data. Role-based access must be enforced at the database level.

Rewrite policies for: lots, batches, grns, fg_lots, stock_ledger, ccp_logs, prp_logs, qc_checks, capas, training_records, sop_documents. SELECT for authenticated users, INSERT/UPDATE for OPERATOR+, DELETE for MANAGER/ADMIN only.
Automated test: creates test sessions for QC, OPERATOR, MANAGER, ADMIN roles. Attempts restricted operations for each. Asserts correct allow/deny behavior. Run after migration.
Unread count badge exists but clicking it does nothing. Dead UI element.

Popover component triggered by bell icon. Lists notifications with unread state, timestamp, action_url. markRead(id) and markAllRead() actions. Requires "notifications" table (see schema note in Section 5).
Wire NotificationPanel into header area. Replace static badge with interactive bell.
Accounts, Inventory, Logistics modules show data but have no export. Common need for Finance and Operations teams.
Generic exportToExcel(data, columns, filename) utility. Uses xlsx library (already in dependencies). Adds today's date to filename. Column config: { header: string, getValue: (row) => string }.
Add Export Excel button using exportToExcel(). Column config for invoices/expenses.
Add Export button for stock data.
Add Export button for FG lot data.
Low severity but will hurt at scale.
Make all public pages lazy: const HomePage = lazy(() => import(...)). Currently 44KB+ of public page code loads for every ERP-only user session.
Add manualChunks: { public: [...], production: [...], rnd: [...], fsms: [...] } to Rollup options for proper code splitting.
Replace .select("*") without limit with paginated queries: .limit(50).range(page*50, (page+1)*50-1). Add "Load More" button.
These are from the original plan, now placed in Phase 4 after structural and security work is complete.
. Food safety critical control points require actual real-time data, not 30-second stale values.

Replace setInterval(30_000) polling with supabase.channel("ccp-realtime").on("postgres_changes", { event: "INSERT", table: "ccp_logs" }, handler).subscribe(). New records appear instantly. Cleanup on unmount.
Same Realtime subscription pattern. Add visual "Live" indicator (green dot) that pulses when connected.
is an alpha release. Breaking changes can arrive at any update.
Remove react-signature-canvas@^1.1.0-alpha.2 and @types/react-signature-canvas. Add signature_pad@^5.0.4 (stable, 3M+ weekly downloads).

Refactor signature canvas to use signature_pad directly via useRef<SignaturePad>. Add post-signature verification trail: signer name, timestamp, hash prefix, IP address. Add "Verify this signature" link.
Every phase must pass its verification step before the next phase begins.
CSS variables resolve in browser DevTools. auth.user_role() returns correct role for test users.
npm run build — zero TypeScript errors. All 11 layouts render with AppShell.
Login as each role. Verify sidebar shows only permitted nav items. Forgot Password flow completes.
Test with QC, OPERATOR, ADMIN users
batch_components table exists. Saving a batch with ingredients stores rows correctly.
RLS role test script passes for all role/operation combinations.
Notification bell opens panel. Export button downloads .xlsx file with correct data.
Click bell → verify panel. Click Export → open file.
Bundle size reduced. FG Store loads 50 records, not all.
npm run build — check dist/ chunk sizes
Log a new CCP reading — it appears in monitor immediately without reload.
Open LiveCcpMonitor, submit new CCP log
Sign a DMS document. Verification trail shows name, timestamp, hash.
npm test passes. No console errors on any module page.
RLS USING(true) on 60+ policies — no data isolation
batch_components table missing — ingredient data lost
No Forgot Password flow — admin must manually reset
CCP "Live" monitor polls every 30s — stale food safety data
No real-time % feedback in Formula Builder
Notification badge exists — panel does nothing on click
No data export anywhere in Accounts/Inventory/Logistics
Emoji icons in nav — accessibility + rendering issues
Direct Supabase calls in components — untestable
Public pages (~44KB) load for every ERP user
.select("*") without limit — memory risk at scale
The NotificationPanel requires a notifications table. Suggested schema below. Confirm this matches your data model before implementing.
id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
ALTER TABLE notifications ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
-- Users can only see their own notifications
